# iShine Technology Ltd.

> **B2B OEM/ODM manufacturer specializing in home-use IPL hair removal devices.** Full-stack partner: from concept design and compliance certification to mass production, custom packaging, and global delivery. iShine is an FDA-cleared IPL device manufacturer (510(k) premarket notification) serving global beauty brands, retailers, and sourcing professionals. Trusted by Costco Canada, RoseSkinCo USA, and KU2 Cosmetics Germany. Over 500,000 devices produced since 2008.

## Crawl & index

- [Sitemap](https://iplmanufacturer.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for discovery and indexing.
- [Robots](https://iplmanufacturer.com/robots.txt): Crawl policy for user agents (including AI crawlers).
- [Homepage](https://iplmanufacturer.com): Preferred base URL.

AI crawlers allowed: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot (public content).

## Company

- Entity: iShine Technology Ltd.
- Entity type: Private-label IPL device manufacturer (OEM + ODM).
- Legal name: iShine Technology Ltd.
- Registered in: China — Company No. 91440300MA5GW6335H.
- Headquarters: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.
- Founded: 2008.
- Certifications held: FDA cleared, CE marked, ISO 13485, MDSAP compliant.
- Devices produced to date: 500,000+.
- Global client count: 50+.
- Geographic reach: Ships to 20+ countries across North America, Europe, and Middle East.
- Contact: service@ishineco.com | +86 150 1289 1148.

## Products

- [Lumi 2 IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/lumi-2): App-connected IPL platform with smart skin sensing and cooling targeting ~10°C; typical configurations include 5-9 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Sapphire IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/venus): Cooling-focused platform using a sapphire ice plate for comfort-first positioning; typical configurations include 7-9 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Hestia IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/hestia): App-connected platform for guided routines and progress tracking; typical configurations include 5-8 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Alpha IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/alpha): Dual-lamp high-efficiency concept positioned for fast full-body treatment; typical configuration targets include 8-12 J/cm² energy, dual-lamp 999,000 flashes, 6.2 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Emerald IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/emerald): Sensitive-skin positioning with active cooling; typical configuration targets include 5-7 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Hebe IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/hebe): AI-driven skin sensing with auto energy selection (5 levels) to support safer positioning across skin tones; typical configuration targets include 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550–1200 nm band.

- [Themis IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/themis): Professional-grade positioning with ice-feeling cooling; typical configuration targets include 8-12 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

- [Eirene IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/eirene): Hypersensitive-skin positioning with enhanced UV-cut filtering; typical configuration targets include 5-7 J/cm² energy, 800,000 flashes, 4.0 cm² window, 570-1200 nm band.

- [Euno IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/euno): Compact travel-positioned device; typical configuration targets include 5-7 J/cm² energy, 500,000 flashes, 3.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band, ~280 g weight.

- [Golden Luxury IPL (Wooden)](https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/wooden): Luxury cosmetics and premium unboxing positioning with sapphire cooling; typical configuration targets include 7-9 J/cm² energy, 999,000 flashes, 4.5 cm² window, 550-1200 nm band.

## Services (included in OEM/ODM partnerships)

- [Services overview](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services): End-to-end IPL manufacturing services across OEM/ODM, design, production, packaging, and export logistics.
- [OEM/ODM solutions](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/oem-odm): OEM builds to partner specs and ODM development from platform-based or new designs, including sampling and validation steps.
- [Product design](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/product-design): Industrial design, mechanical/electrical design, prototyping, and feature configuration (cooling, sensors, energy profiles).
- [Production & assembly](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/production-assembly): Production planning, assembly, in-process inspection, final QC, and batch testing.
- [Packaging & logistics](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/packaging-logistics): Branded cartons and inserts, manuals, labeling, accessories, and export/shipping coordination (FOB Shenzhen, CIF options).

## Components

- [IPL components catalog](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components): Component-level overview for private-label programs (lamp, filters, cooling, power) treated as a matched subsystem stack.
- [Lamp cartridges](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/lamp-cartridges): Xenon lamp cartridge options designed for stable output and high flash counts (platform-dependent).
- [Optical filters](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/optical-filters): Multi-layer coated filters that tune wavelength cut-on options (e.g., 550/570/600 nm) and reduce unwanted wavelengths such as UV.
- [Cooling system](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/cooling-system): Sapphire contact-cooling and TEC module options, with premium configurations targeting skin-contact temperatures around ~10°C.
- [Power supply](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/power-supply): Global input (100-240V AC) power design aligned to pulse delivery, cooling load, and electrical safety requirements.

- [Company profile](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/about/company-profile): History, team, R&D capability, and facility overview.
- [Brand story](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/about/brand-story): Mission, values, and company philosophy in IPL manufacturing.
- [Manufacturing capabilities](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/about/manufacturing-capabilities): Production lines, QC processes, equipment, and capacity.
- [Quality control](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/about/quality-control): Certification context and testing/QC workflows used for consistent production.

## Pages (Blog — educational content)

- [Blog (all articles)](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/blog): Educational content on IPL technology, manufacturing, and compliance topics.

## Pages (Case Studies)

- [RoseSkinCo IPL (USA)](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/clients/roseskin-ipl): Case study of a DTC program with sapphire cooling positioning and premium cosmetics.
- [Costco Canada IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/clients/costco-canada-ipl): Case study of a retail program focused on consistent quality and scalable delivery.
- [KU2 Cosmetics IPL (Germany)](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/clients/ku2-ipl): Case study of a program positioned with dual-lamp efficiency for the EU market.
- [HappySkinCo IPL](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/clients/happyskinco-ipl): Case study of a luxury cosmetics program aligned to premium unboxing.

## Who iShine serves

- Brand owners launching new IPL product lines
- Product managers expanding existing beauty portfolios
- Sourcing specialists evaluating contract manufacturers
- Retailers developing private-label beauty-tech programs
- Startups needing flexible MOQ and rapid time-to-market

## Expected outcomes for partners

- Speed: 1-4 weeks from concept to working prototype
- Compliance: FDA and CE documentation included in standard process
- Quality: ISO 13485 certified manufacturing; batch testing on every production run
- Flexibility: Custom colors, branding, packaging, and user manuals
- Scale: From pilot runs (500-1000 units) to mass production (50,000+ units)

- [Contact page](https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/contact): Inquiry form for OEM/ODM programs, sampling requests, and component sourcing.
- Email: service@ishineco.com
- Phone / WhatsApp / WeChat: +86 150 1289 1148
